title: carex intermedia f. elatior
intro: Carex intermedia f. elatior, also known as the tall sedge, is a type of plant in the Carex genus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Carex intermedia f. elatior is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and may also be used in tinctures or salves for topical application.
